p2p_enrich.notes: Added 4 pass_to_pass CI-based tests: 1) test_repo_workflow_yamllint - validates cache.yml and gradle-cache-acceptance.yml with yamllint, 2) test_repo_mise_scripts_bash_syntax - validates bash syntax of mise utility scripts, 3) test_repo_mise_toml_valid - validates TOML structure of mise.toml files, 4) test_repo_elixir_configs_valid - validates structure of Elixir config files. All p2p tests pass. The fail_to_pass tests fail as expected because the fix (dev_instance_env.sh and related changes) hasn't been applied to the base commit. Repository is Elixir/Phoenix with mise task runner.

validate.notes: Fixed test_dev_instance_script_validates_bad_suffix: script outputs error message but returns exit code 0, so changed assertion to check for error message in output instead of non-zero exit code. All 4 validations pass: Docker build OK, NOP test reward=0 (10 fail_to_pass fail correctly), Gold test reward=1 (14 tests pass).
